How-To-Repeat: 	I using script for building release:
---------------------------------
#!/bin/sh
#
# script for auto-build fresh release

RELEASE="RELENG_6"
# DATE="month/day/year hour:mins:sec UTC"
DATE="01/23/2007 12:00:00 UTC"

(rm -rf /usr/src/*; rm -rf /usr/obj/*; cd /usr/; \
CVSROOT=/home/ncvs cvs export -r${RELEASE} \
        -D "${DATE}" src; \
	portsnap fetch update; \
        cp /root/conf/MYKERN1 /root/conf/MYKERN1DEB /root/conf/MYKERN2DEB /root/conf/THINKPAD_KST /usr/src/sys/i386/conf/; \
        cp /root/conf/install.cfg /usr/src/release/; \
        cd /usr/src; patch -p0 < /root/conf/local.patch && \
        cd /usr/src && \
	make -j4 buildworld && \
        make buildkernel KERNCONF=THINKPAD_KST && \
	make buildkernel KERNCONF=MYKERN1 && \
        make buildkernel KERNCONF=MYKERN1DEB && \
        make buildkernel KERNCONF=MYKERN2DEB && \
        cd release && make release BUILDNAME=${RELEASE} \
                CHROOTDIR=/usr/release \
                CVSROOT=/home/ncvs \
                EXTSRCDIR=/usr/src \
                KERNELS=MYKERN1 \
                MAKE_ISOS=yes \
                NOPORTS=yes \
                RELEASETAG=${RELEASE} \
		WORLD_FLAGS="-j4" \
		KERNEL_FLAGS="" \
		) > \
/var/log/make_release.log 2>&1
